partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 3) has not yet acted; their hand count is 3. No direct signal is available, but by leading a low heart the opponent has revealed a vulnerability in the heart suit. Partner likely wants the team to win the trick or at least prevent the opponent from retaining the lead.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponent player 0 led a low single heart and has only 2 cards remaining, indicating they are near finishing. Their objective is likely to play out their last cards quickly, possibly with another low single or a small combination. They may be hoping opponents will pass or overcommit high cards.
